title: Find the Duplicate (O(n))
description:
Given an array of integers, return the FIRST value that appears more than once. If no duplicate exists, return -1.

**The point of this problem**: a naive nested-loop solution is O(n²). Using a Set, you can do it in O(n) time with O(n) extra space — a classic time/space trade.

examples.explanation: 2 appears at indices 1 and 3 — the first repeat we encounter is 2.

hints: Brute force: for each i, check every j > i. That's O(n²).
Could you remember every number you've seen as you go?
A JavaScript Set has O(1) average has() and add().
